title: pterostylis polyphylla
intro: Pterostylis polyphylla, also known as the Rough Greenhood or Greenhood orchid, is a terrestrial orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Pterostylis polyphylla can be used as a tincture, tea, or dried extract, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
